task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Rivian R1T (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $70900.00 and wholesale is $58400.00. Product features: Electric pickup truck with quad-motor AWD and 314-mile range. Reference: https://rivian.com/r1t

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Rivian R1T. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Rivian R1T. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
